'''Bantha rump''' was a type of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] food.

==Description==
Also known as '''bantha surprise''', this rump roast was prepared using cuts of meat from the [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] tenderloin, and [[Stew/Legends|stewed]] in a [[Broth/Legends|broth]] of various seasonings and [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetables]] native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==History==
The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]] made one of these once for [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]]. [[Chef/Legends|Chef]] [[Gormaanda/Legends|Gormaanda]] also made one over a transmission, for her viewers to see. However, the Wookiee matriarch, who was already dealing with worry regarding her husband [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] delayed arrival for Life Day, gradually got frustrated by the amount of time it took to make the meal and eventually smashed the transmission.<ref name="Holiday Special" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
During Life Day of [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], a number of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] obtained recipes for [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] rump from [[Saun Dann]] so that it could be prepared by [[Merchant/Legends|domestic traders]].<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
According to the [[The Star Wars Holiday Special|''Star Wars Holiday Special'']] script, the contents of the bowls included: [[Wikipedia:Beef tenderloin|Beef Fillet]], [[Wikipedia:Potato|Sliced Potatoes]], [[Wikipedia:Celery|Celery]], [[Wikipedia:Pachyrhizus erosus|Jicama]], [[Wikipedia:Parsley|Parsley]], [[Wikipedia:Bay leaf|Bay Leaves]], [[Wikipedia:Chickpea|Garbanzo Beans]], [[Wikipedia:Radish|Radishes]], [[Wikipedia:Ginger|Ginger Roots]], [[Wikipedia:Water|Water]], [[Wikipedia:Cranberry|Cranberries]], and [[Wikipedia:Cooking oil|Cooking Oil]], as the ingredients.

In the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] rump was introduced to the [[Star Wars video games|game]] during the [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]] festivities of [[2008]]. In the game, [[:w:c:swg:Bantha|bantha]] rump was referred to as bantha surprise, and the recipe could be purchased from [[Saun Dann]] using [[:w:c:swg:Life Day|Life Day]] [[propaganda token]]s. The recipe for bantha surprise was once again sold during subsequent Life Day celebrations in [[2009]] and [[2010]]. It could be made by [[Merchant/Legends|domestic traders]], a [[:w:c:swg:Profession|profession]] that specialized in the creation of various [[:w:c:swg:Item|goods]], including [[:w:c:swg:Food|food]]. [[:w:c:swg:Trader (Domestic Goods)|Domestic traders]] took the place of [[Chef/Legends|chefs]] and [[Artisan/Legends|artisans]], after those professions were removed from the game during the [[:w:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]] of [[November 15]], [[2005]].
